recommendations.title: Ma famille t'adore déjà !
recommendations.overview: A young man meets his soon-to-be in-laws but discovers behind their proud and wealthy appearances some deep issues and lies.

recommendations.title: (Girl)Friend
recommendations.overview: Vincent and Nefeli just moved in together. They're best friends and swore to never fall in love again. That is until Vincent meets Julie.

recommendations.title: Aline
recommendations.overview: A fictionalized biopic of Aline Dieu, a multitalented singer from a musically inclined family.

recommendations.title: Vincent
recommendations.overview: Young Vincent Malloy dreams of being just like Vincent Price and loses himself in macabre daydreams that annoy his mother.

recommendations.title: Marie-Francine
recommendations.overview: A woman at the age of 50 moves back in with her parents after her husband leave her for a younger woman.

recommendations.title: You Choose!
recommendations.overview: Even at the age of 40, Juliette is used to other people making decisions for her. When she meets two guys she likes, she has to finally make her own decision.

recommendations.title: The Color of Money

recommendations.title: What's in a Name
recommendations.overview: Vincent, a wealthy real estate agent, is invited to dinner by his sister Elizabeth and her husband Peter, both professors in Paris. Claude, a childhood friend and trombonist in a symphony orchestra, is also present. Vincent brings news from the prena
recommendations.director: Alexandre de La Patellière, Matthieu Delaporte

recommendations.title: The Visitors
recommendations.overview: After a wizard's spell goes awry, 12th-century Gallic knight Godefroy de Papincourt, Count of Montmirail finds himself transported to 1993, along with his dimwitted servant, Jacquouille la Fripouille. Startled and perplexed by modern technology, the

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.
